captions: modern C-pop, emotional ballad, piano-driven, tender vocals, cinematic strings, heartfelt, bittersweet melody
upbeat Chinese pop, dance beat, catchy synth melody, youthful energy, bright production, idol pop style
Chinese R&B, smooth groove, atmospheric synths, soft vocals, urban night vibes, jazzy chords, modern
Chinese rock-pop, electric guitar, driving beat, powerful vocals, anthemic chorus, stadium energy, inspirational
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
月光洒在窗前
思念像风吹过脸
你的笑容在眼前
温暖了整个冬天

[Chorus]
让我陪你到永远
穿过风雨和晴天
每一步都不孤单
因为有你在身边

[Verse 2]
城市的灯火闪烁
我们走过每条街
不管未来多遥远
牵着手就不会变

[Chorus]
让我陪你到永远
穿过风雨和晴天
每一步都不孤单
因为有你在身边

[Bridge]
时间带不走的
是我们的故事
刻在心里最深处

[Outro]
永远在你身边
不会改变
